particulars.description: By way of legal mortgage, the freehold property known as 12 dorset avenue, ferndown BH22 8HW, land registry title number DT281203. By way of fixed charge: all freehold and leasehold properties (whether registered or unregistered) and all commonhold properties, now or in the future (and from time to time) owned by the company, or in which the company holds an interest; all present and future interests of the company not effectively mortgaged or charged under the preceding paragraphs in, or over, freehold or leasehold property; and all the intellectual property (as defined in the instrument).
